content: We need to settle on the lens-of-lenses storage. Should LensSpec embed a kind discriminator with members for composition, or stay flat? I want a decision recorded today.

Proposing DEC-0099: extend LensSpec with a `kind` field (atomic | composite) and a `members` array for composite lenses. Atomic lenses keep current shape. Status: enacted, since the POC F output already exercises this and we have empirical grounding. Filing it now.
Good. Separate thread — the AJV cache discipline keeps biting us when schema files change mid-session. File an issue so we don't lose the thread.

Filing issue-091: AJV schema cache survives schema-file mtime change, producing stale validation against prior schema version. Body: reproduce by editing schemas/foo.schema.json then immediately re-running validation in the same process — old errors persist. Status: open, priority: medium.

Also flagging issue-XYZ: when a workflow step rewrites a block file under contention, the post-step snapshot diff is sometimes empty even though the file changed on disk. Status: open. Need to investigate the snapshot timing window — but I do not have a body draft yet, will fill in after reproducing.
